questionText: Have your organization's base year emissions and past years' emissions been recalculated as a result of any changes or errors reported in 7.1.1 and/or 7.1.2?
questionKo: 7.1.1 및/또는 7.1.2 문항에서 보고한 변경 사항이나 오류로 인해 조직의 기준연도 배출량과 과거연도 배출량을 재산정했습니까?
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Significant changes (structural, methodological, boundary etc.) can alter a company's emissions profile, making meaningful historical comparisons difficult. To maintain consistency over time, base year emissions must be retroactively recalculated to reflect changes in the company that would otherwise compromise the consistency and relevance of a company's GHG emissions inventory. This question allows data users to understand whether the company has recalculated their base year emissions as a result of the changes or errors disclosed in 7.1.1 and 7.1.2.

options: No, because we have not evaluated whether the changes should trigger a base year recalculation
No, because the impact does not meet our significance threshold
No, because the operations acquired or divested did not exist in the base year
No, because we do not have the data yet and plan to recalculate next year
optionsKo: No, because we have not evaluated whether the changes 해야 합니다 trigger a 기준연도 re계산
No, because the impact does not meet our significance threshold
No, because the operations acquired 또는 divested did not exist in the 기준연도
No, because we do not have the data yet 및 plan to recalculate next year

options: Fuel and energy-related activities (not included in Scope 1or 2)
End of life treatment of sold products
columns.textKo: 기준연도 배출량 재산정 정책(중대성 기준(sig nificance threshold) 포함)
optionsKo: Fuel 및 energy-related activities (not included in Scope 1or 2)
End of life treatment of sold products

columns.text: Base year emissions recalculation policy, including significance threshold

guidance.text: This question only appears if any of the "Yes" options are selected in 7.1.1, or if any of the "Yes" options or "No, but we have discovered significant errors in our previous response" is selected in response to 7.1.2.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 하나 이상 의 "예" options are 선택 in 7.1.1, 또는 만약 하나 이상 의 "예" options 또는 "No, but we have discovered significant errors in our previous response" is 선택 in response to 7.1.2.

guidance.text:
General 
The GHG Protocol Corporate Standard states that you should recalculate your base year emissions if your organization has changed structurally through acquisitions and/or divestments, the methodology or boundary used to calculate your emissions has changed, you have found significant errors in previous calculations, or if there have been changes to your excluded sources. This is so that your base year emissions can be directly compared with your current/reporting year emissions.
A company may, however, decide not to do this if the impact on emissions is not material or significant. It is up to each company to determine the threshold for what is considered significant or material by developing a base year recalculation policy. Organizations should apply their base year recalculation policy in a consistent manner (i.e. you should recalculate for both emissions increases and decreases).
Companies recalculating their base year emissions may also, as per the GHG Protocol, optionally recalculate GHG emissions data for past years between the base year and the reporting year.
Base year recalculation (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if your organization has recalculated your base year emissions as a result of the changes or errors disclosed in 7.1.1 and/or 7.1.2. The basis of the recalculation should be consistent with your recalculation policy (as described in column 2) and should be reflected in the base year emissions figures you disclose in 7.5.
Select "No, because we have not evaluated a recalculation of our base year" if you do not have a base year recalculation policy, or you have not evaluated whether the changes or errors identified in 7.1.1 and/or 7.1.2 should trigger a base year recalculation as per your policy.
Select "No, because the impact does not meet our significance threshold" if you have a base year recalculation policy and you have evaluated that the changes or errors identified in 7.1.1 and/or 7.1.2 do not meet your policy's significance threshold and therefore the impact on emissions is deemed to be non-material.
Select "No, because we do not have the data yet and plan to recalculate next year" if your organization has merged with or acquired a company and you do not yet have the emissions data for the organization you have merged with or acquired. As per the GHG Protocol Corporate standard, "if it is not possible to make a recalculation in the year of the structural change (e.g. due to lack of data for an acquired company), the recalculation may be carried out the following year". In this scenario, the emissions from the company your organization has merged with or acquired should be reported as an excluded source of emissions in 7.4.1 in this CDP response.
Scopes recalculated (column 2) 
This column only appears if you select "Yes" in column 1 "Base year recalculation".
Depending on the changes that have triggered a base year calculation (as disclosed in 7.1.1 and/or 7.1.2), it may not be necessary to recalculate your organization's base year emissions for all scopes. For example, you may have found a significant error in your calculation of a single category of scope 3 emissions.
Indicate in this column the scopes for which you have recalculated your base year emissions.
Scope 3 categories recalculated (column 3) 
This column only appears if you select "Scope 3" in column 2 "Scopes recalculated"
Indicate in this column the scope 3 categories for which you have recalculated your base year emissions.
Base year emissions recalculation policy, including significance threshold (column 4) 
Describe your organization's base year recalculation policy, and if "Yes" was selected in column 1, clearly articulate the basis and context of the recalculation.
Ensure to include the significance threshold applied for determining base year recalculations.
Past years' recalculation (column 5) 
Select "Yes" if, due to changes or errors reported in 7.1.1 and/or 7.5.2, in addition to your base year recalculation you have also recalculated emissions data for past years, and are restating them in 7.6, 7.7, and 7.8.
If you select "Yes" in this column, ensure you have also selected "Yes" in column 3 of 1.4 and indicated the number of past years of emissions you wish to restate for each Scope in columns 4-6 of 1.4.
guidance.textKo: 일반 The GHG Protocol Corporate Standard states that you 해야 합니다 recalculate your 기준연도 emissions 만약 귀사 has changed structurally through acquisitions 및/또는 divestments, the 방법론 또는 boundary used to calculate your emissions has changed, you have found significant errors in previous 계산s, 또는 만약 there have been changes to your excluded sources. This is so that your 기준연도 emissions can be directly compared with your current/보고연도 emissions. A company may, however, decide not to do this 만약 the impact on emissions is not material 또는 significant. It is up to each company to determine the threshold for what is considered significant 또는 material by developing a 기준연도 re계산 정책. Organizations 해야 합니다 apply their 기준연도 re계산 정책 in a consistent manner (i.e. you 해야 합니다 recalculate for both emissions increases 및 decreases). Companies recalculating their 기준연도 emissions may also, as per the GHG Protocol, optionally recalculate GHG 배출량 데이터 for past years between the 기준연도 및 the 보고연도. 기준연도 re계산 (열 1) Select "예" 만약 귀사 has recalculated your 기준연도 emissions as a result 의 changes 또는 errors 공개 in 7.1.1 및/또는 7.1.2. The basis 의 re계산 해야 합니다 be consistent with your re계산 정책 (as 설명d in 열 2) 및 해야 합니다 be reflected in the 기준연도 emissions figures you disclose in 7.5. Select "No, because we have not evaluated a re계산 of our 기준연도" 만약 you do not have a 기준연도 re계산 정책, 또는 you have not evaluated whether the changes 또는 errors identified in 7.1.1 및/또는 7.1.2 해야 합니다 trigger a 기준연도 re계산 as per your 정책. Select "No, because the impact does not meet our significance threshold" 만약 you have a 기준연도 re계산 정책 및 you have evaluated that the changes 또는 errors identified in 7.1.1 및/또는 7.1.2 do not meet your 정책's significance threshold 및 therefore the impact on emissions is deemed to be non-material. Select "No, because we do not have the data yet 및 plan to recalculate next year" 만약 귀사 has merged with 또는 acquired a company 및 you do not yet have the 배출량 데이터 에 대한 organization you have merged with 또는 acquired. As per the GHG Protocol Corporate standard, "만약 it is not possible to make a re계산 in the year 의 structural change (e.g. due to 부족 data for an acquired company), the re계산 may be carried out the following year". In this scenario, the emissions from the company 귀사 has merged with 또는 acquired 해야 합니다 be 보고 as an excluded source of emissions in 7.4.1 in this CDP response. 재산정 배출량 범위 (열 2) This 열 only appears 만약 you select "예" in 열 1 "기준연도 re계산". Depending on the changes that have triggered a 기준연도 계산 (as 공개 in 7.1.1 및/또는 7.1.2), it may not be necessary to recalculate 귀사의 기준연도 emissions for all scopes. For example, you may have found a significant error in your 계산 of a single category of Scope 3 배출량. Indicate in this 열 the scopes for which you have recalculated your 기준연도 emissions. 기준연도 배출량 재산정 정책(중대성 기준(sig nificance threshold) 포함) (열 3) This 열 only appears 만약 you select "Scope 3" in 열 2 "재산정 배출량 범위" Indicate in this 열 the scope 3 categories for which you have recalculated your 기준연도 emissions. 기준연도 emissions re계산 정책, 포함 significance threshold (열 4) 설명 귀사의 기준연도 re계산 정책, 및 만약 "예" was 선택 in 열 1, clearly articulate the basis 및 context 의 re계산. Ensure to include the significance threshold applied for determining 기준연도 re계산s. Past years' re계산 (열 5) Select "예" 만약, due to changes 또는 errors 보고 in 7.1.1 및/또는 7.5.2, in addition to your 기준연도 re계산 you have also recalculated 배출량 데이터 for past years, 및 are restating them in 7.6, 7.7, 및 7.8. 만약 you select "예" in this 열, ensure you have also 선택 "예" in 열 3 of 1.4 및 indicated the number of past years of emissions you wish to restate for each Scope in 열 4-6 of 1.4.

guidance.text: Companies recalculate base year emissions, and emissions from previous years to reflect changes that would otherwise compromise the consistency and relevance of the reported GHG emissions information.
guidance.textKo: Companies recalculate 기준연도 emissions, 및 emissions from previous years to reflect changes that would otherwise compromise the consistency 및 relevance 의 보고 온실가스 배출량 information.

guidance.text: Significance threshold: As noted on page 35 of the GHG Protocol Corporate Standard , a significance threshold is a "qualitative and/or quantitative criterion used to define any significant change to the data, inventory boundary, methods, or any other relevant factors. It is the responsibility of the company to determine the significance threshold that triggers base year emissions recalculation and to disclose it."
guidance.textKo: Significance threshold: As noted on page 35 의 GHG Protocol Corporate Standard, a significance threshold is a "qualitative 및/또는 quantitative criterion used to define 하나 이상 significant change to the data, inventory boundary, methods, 또는 하나 이상 other 관련 factors. It is the responsibility 의 company to determine the significance threshold that triggers 기준연도 emissions re계산 및 to disclose it."

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Awareness points:
Full Disclosure points awarded AND
Full Disclosure points awarded in all of the following questions:
- 7.1
- 7.1.1
- 7.1.2
Any option excluding 'No, because we have not evaluated...' selected in column 'Base year recalculation' - 3 points
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to be 획득 가능 for 인지 점: 공시에서 최고점 획득 그리고 공시에서 최고점 획득 in all 의 following 문항: - 7.1 - 7.1.1 - 7.1.2 하나 이상 option 제외 'No, because we have not evaluated...' 선택 in 열 '기준연도 re계산' - 3 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
ROUTE A)
Any of the following selected in column 'Base year recalculation' - 2 points
- 'Yes'
- 'No, because the impact does not meet our significance threshold'
- 'No, because the operations acquired or divested did not exist in the base year'
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, because we do not have the data yet and plan to recalculate next year' selected in column 'Base year recalculation'- 1.5/2 points
A maximum of 1.5/2 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 관리 점수를 획득하려면 인지에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 경로 A) 하나 이상 의 following 선택 in 열 '기준연도 re계산' - 2 점 - '예' - 'No, because the impact does not meet our significance threshold' - 'No, because the operations acquired 또는 divested did not exist in the 기준연도' 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'No, because we do not have the data yet 및 plan to recalculate next year' 선택 in 열 '기준연도 re계산'- 1.5/2 점 A 최고 of 1.5/2 점 is available for this 경로.

change.question_ko: 7.1.1 및/또는 7.1.2 문항에서 보고한 변경 사항이나 오류로 인해 조직의 기준연도 배출량과 과거연도 배출량을 재산정했습니까?
change.q2025_text: Have your organization's base year emissions and past years' emissions been recalculated as a result of any changes or errors reported in 7.1.1 and/or 7.1.2?
change.daml_summary: General: D 2/2 | A 3/3 | M 1.5 or 2/2 | L 0/0

change.q2025_textKo: Have 귀사의 기준연도 emissions 및 past years' emissions been recalculated as a result of 하나 이상 changes 또는 errors 보고 in 7.1.1 및/또는 7.1.2?

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: Significant changes (structural, methodological, boundary etc.) can alter a company's emissions profile, making meaningful historical comparisons difficult. To maintain consistency over time, 기준연도 emissions 해야 합니다 be retroactively recalculated to reflect changes in the company that would otherwise compromise the consistency 및 relevance of a company's 온실가스 배출량 inventory. This 문항 allows 데이터 사용자 to understand whether the company has recalculated their 기준연도 emissions as a result 의 changes 또는 errors 공개 in 7.1.1 및 7.1.2.
